playlist.author: America's Got Talent
playlist.description: After walking away from music, Jessica Sanchez rediscovered her voice, her confidence, and her purpose. With a baby on the way and fire in her soul, she delivers a breathtaking performance of "Beautiful Things" by Benson Boone, earning one of the most emotional Golden Buzzer moments of the season.
playlist.title: Jessica Sanchez Receives A GOLDEN BUZZER From Sofia Vergara | AGT 2025
